name: just-enough
description: just-enough — a general-purpose code-restraint discipline for AI coding agents (de-golfed ponytail).

plugins.name: just-enough
plugins.description: The best code is the code you never wrote — walks a reuse ladder (necessity → reuse what's here → standard library → existing dependency → minimal code) before writing anything, marks deliberate simplifications with their upgrade path, and stops at the minimal READABLE solution, never a golfed one-liner.
